message:
fix(wasm32): handle LLVM FastISel u64 return corruption in frozen dispatch

On WASM32, LLVM FastISel corrupts the high 32 bits when returning u64
values from functions. This caused frozen function float returns to be
corrupted (e.g., 5.0 would become 2.5).

The fix uses split globals (g_return_slot_lo/hi) to pass the return
value separately:

- frozen functions write to split globals before returning
- native_dispatch reads from split globals instead of using return value
- QuickJS can call frozen_dispatch_get_return_lo/hi for fixup

Also adds nativeGetLengthCV helper that reads from globals on WASM32.
